video_title: AI: candle top remelting glossy and level from gentle heat

seconds.vision_desc: Static close-up of the top of a cream jar candle, surface turning glossy and liquid from gentle warmth
a shallow melt pool spreads from the wick, flowing toward a small crater beside it
liquid wax flows into the crater, surface settling level, soft moving reflections
the melt pool covers the crater, glossy liquid top around the wick
shallow pool fully level, reflections drifting across the warmed wax
glossy liquid candle top, wick centered, crater gone beneath the level pool
soft reflections moving over the smooth remelted surface
the warmed top sets level and glossy around the wick

windows.embed_text: top surface of a cream jar candle turning glossy and liquid from gentle warmth, shallow melt pool flowing into a small crater beside the wick and settling perfectly level, no tool in frame

windows.summary_v2: Candle top remelts glossy and self-levels into a small crater beside the wick.
